zh.lifeSummary: Alice Hill是Robert Hill的女兒，於1478年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特艾格頓。她於1490年與James Aucher在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年1月在英國肯特享年31歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Hill是Robert Hill的女儿，于1478年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特艾格頓。她于1490年与James Aucher在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1509年1月在英国肯特享年31岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Hill was born in 1478, in Eggerton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Hill. She married James Aucher in 1490, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in January 1509, in Kent, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Hill est née en 1478, à Eggerton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert Hill. Elle a épousé James Aucher en 1490, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en janvier 1509, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Hill wurde 1478 in Eggerton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Robert Hill geboren. Sie hat 1490 in Kent, England, United Kingdom James Aucher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Januar 1509 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Hill è nata il nel 1478 nel Eggerton, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Robert Hill. Lei sposato James Aucher nel 1490, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1509, nel Kent, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Hillは1478年にイギリスイギリスドールセトエグジャートンでRobert Hillの娘として生まれた。1490年にイギリスイギリスケントでJames Aucherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1509年1月にイギリスケントで31歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Hill(은)는 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 거턴에서 Robert Hill의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 James Aucher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 1월 영국 켄트에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Hill nasceu em 1478, em Eggerton, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Robert Hill. Ela casou-se com James Aucher em 1490, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1509, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Hill родилась в 1478 г. в местности эгиртон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert Hill. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Aucher в 1490 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла январь 1509 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Hill nació en 1478, en Eggerton, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Robert Hill. Se casó con James Aucher en 1490, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en enero de 1509, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
